note: Three consecutive real open issues (Phase 1/2/3 Ollama->convergence) used as the deterministic demonstration set for issue #592 autonomous loop.

issues.title: [Phase 1] Diagnose Ollama agent failure â€” RP artifacts and verification gaps
issues.body:
## Objective

Understand why the local Ollama coding agent stopped working and identify what RP/roleplay tuning is blocking Î£â‚€ verification.

## Tasks

- [ ] Review system prompt history (dream-chat.js line ~350)
  - Find RP-specific directives (storytelling, character, world-building, etc.)
  - Document how they conflict with code verification

- [ ] Test local Ollama qwen2.5-coder
  - Verify model still runs: `ollama run qwen2.5-coder`
  - Log sample requests/responses
  - Identify where it deviates from verification

- [ ] Analyze prior test failures
  - Find test run logs in `data/convergence-test-runs/`
  - Identify categories of failures (hallucination, role-play, ungrounded claims)

- [ ] Create diagnostic report in `data/agent-diagnostics/ollama-coder-phase1.json`:
  - model_status: running or failed
  - prompt_issues: list of RP artifacts
  - verification_gaps: list of ungrounded claims
  - confidence_score_missing: true or false
  - recommendation: rebuild, retune, or replace

## Success

Diagnostic report filed and reviewed in phase planning.

## Linked Issue

#628 â€” Local Ollama coding agent â€” Î£â‚€ update

issues.title: [Phase 2] Rebuild with Î£â‚€ verification grounding â€” Evidence + confidence
issues.body:
## Objective

Rebuild the local Ollama coding agent with Î£â‚€ (sigma-zero) verification-first architecture.

## Requirements from !CONVERGANCE-SIGMA0-BRIEFING

- All code claims backed by evidence (no hallucinations)
- Verification gate: code can't be generated until requirements are ground-truth verified
- Confidence scoring: each suggestion gets 0-100% confidence
- Evidence chain: input â†’ analysis â†’ code â†’ verification result

## Tasks

- [ ] Update system prompt in dream-chat.js
  - Remove all RP directives (storytelling, character voices, world-building)
  - Add explicit evidence-first requirement
  - Add confidence score output format
  - Add verification checklist before code generation

- [ ] Implement verification gate
  - Wire into convergence-dispatch.js
  - Each code generation request triggers validation pipeline
  - Halt generation if requirements unverified

- [ ] Add confidence scoring
  - Create keystone-analyzer.js confidence model (see #568)
  - Score: model certainty + evidence quality + test coverage
  - Return: code + confidence + reasoning

- [ ] Test against convergence records
  - Each generated code appends convergence record
  - Record: code + requirements + confidence + verification result
  - Format: [claim, evidence, confidence, source]

## Integration Points

- convergence-dispatch.js: route code requests through verification gate
- keystone-test-engine.js: auto-test generated code
- dream-chat.js: wire new system prompt

## Success Criteria

- All code samples have confidence scores (0-100%)
- Zero hallucinated functions (100% verification rate)
- Test coverage requirement: generated code must have tests
- Convergence record appended for each generation

## Linked Issues

#628 â€” Parent epic
#629 â€” Phase 1 diagnosis

issues.title: [Phase 3] Integration â€” Wire Ollama into convergence dispatch + keystone-test-engine
issues.body:
## Objective

Wire the rebuilt Ollama agent into the convergence dispatch system for autonomous code generation with verification.

## Integration Tasks

- [ ] Wire convergence-dispatch router
  - Add local Ollama as code-generation provider
  - Route code requests through agent
  - Catch verification failures gracefully

- [ ] Add to convergence chain
  - Observe stage: code generation request
  - Remember stage: store prompt + model state
  - Reason stage: verify requirements are sound
  - Act stage: call Ollama with verified requirements
  - Verify stage: run tests on generated code
  - Converge stage: append convergence record with evidence chain

- [ ] Integrate with keystone-test-engine.js
  - Wire code generation into autonomous work pipeline
  - Each generated function gets auto-test
  - Test results feed back into convergence record

- [ ] Document verified behaviors
  - Create list of known-good code patterns
  - Document confidence thresholds for production use
  - Write runbook for debugging low-confidence outputs

## Success Criteria

- Local Ollama generates code without external API calls
- 100% of generated code has convergence records
- Test-first: generated code must pass tests before delivery
- Confidence threshold enforced (e.g., reject <60% confidence)

## Linked Issues

#628 â€” Parent epic
#630 â€” Phase 2 rebuild
